full_text:
DOUBLE STAINING ON p-SECTIONS WITH FLUORESCENCE SECONDARY

Samples: S021_pOme

S022_pOme

S023_iOme

Prepare citrate buffer

Always use freshly prepared sodium citrate buffer; 500 ml for 1 set of slides

Final buffer to be 10 mM, pH 6.0

For 500ml: 1,47g tri-sodium citrate (dihydrate), 500ml distilled water. Adjust pH with 1N HCl, and as a final step add 250ul Tween20.

Leave to dissolve on magnetic stirrer while deparafination / rehydration

Baking

Place the slides vertically into a grey slide holder and place it inside an oven set to 56C for 30 min

Deparafination + rehydration

3 x 5 min Xylene

1 x 3 min 100% ethanol

1 x 3 min 90% ethanol

1 x 3 min 70% ethanol

1 x 3 min 50% ethanol

1 x 3 min 30% ethanol

2 x 1 min successive 1x PBS solution

Epitope revealing

Preheat buffer to be around 60C

Boil sections in microwave at 600W for 15 min

Make sure that sections are covered with buffer all the time

Cool down 15-30 min RT

wash 2x5min with 1xTBS

Blocking 40 min, RT

Block with Odyssey blocking buffer,

Let extra liquid drain down (keeping the glass vertically, do not let to dry completely!), circle each section with a pap pen (do we have one in Färkkilä lab?)

Use about 200-300 uL blocking buffer per section

Wipe the excess buffer carefully off around the tissue

wash 2x5 min PBS

Stainings – make a cocktail in Odyssey blocking buffer, 1 hr RT

Hoechst

Prepare first a dilution of 1: 1000 , then working solution 1:100

+4C, Box1, Slot I9

E-cadherin Alexa 488 nm, rabbit monoclonal (CST, 3199S)

1:100

+4C, Box1, slot B4

Phalloidin Alexa 568 nm (Life Technologies, A12380)

1:40

-20C, Box2

CD45 Alexa 647 nm, mouse monoclonal (304020, Biolegend)

1:100

+4C, Box1, slot A3

wipe the excess buffer carefully off around the tissue

wash 2x5 min PBS

wash 1 x 5min H2O

wipe the excess buffer carefully off around the tissue

Mount with Immumount, let the slides dry in hood (~1hour) (cover with foil)

Seal same day with Eukitt Quick-hardening mounting medium (Sigma)
